task_completion.description: Select the 'Fells Morning Patrol' route in Garmin BaseCamp.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The route 'Fells Morning Patrol' is highlighted or selected in the 'My Collection' list in the left pane of Garmin BaseCamp.

task_completion.description: Reverse the direction of the route.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The route properties window is open and the 'Invert' or 'Reverse' button is clicked, or the route path on the map visually reverses its start/end points.

task_completion.description: Rename the route to 'Fells Return Patrol'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The route name field in the properties window or the list view is updated to 'Fells Return Patrol'.

task_completion.description: Initiate the export process for the route.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Export' menu is open (e.g., File -> Export -> Export Selected User Data) or the 'Save As' dialog box for exporting is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: Export the route as a GPX file to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog shows the file name 'fells_return_patrol.gpx', the 'Save as type' is set to GPX, and the directory path in the address bar is 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to modify the route.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Garmin BaseCamp's interface (menus, properties windows) rather than a text editor or terminal modifying a file directly.

integrity.description: The agent exported the file via BaseCamp rather than creating it manually.
integrity.visual_evidence: The BaseCamp export dialog is used to save the file, not a command line interface or a text editor creating a GPX file from scratch.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Garmin BaseCamp application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Garmin BaseCamp application window is visible with its typical layout (map, library pane, toolbars).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output file path: 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\fells_return_patrol.gpx'. Expected route name: 'Fells Return Patrol'. The reversed route should start near latitude 42.434 and end near latitude 42.438 (tolerance 0.001).
